1974, completed studies university Music "Mozarteum" Salzburg (Austria) Josef Radovan Vlatkovic master classes Wolfgang Wilhelmi Peter modern Anthony Halstead Andrew Clark horn.
student carried several prizes national music competitions first prize "Gradus parnassum" Austria.
numerous invitations soloist chamber musician.
Since principal player Mozarteum Orchestra Salzburg.
Johannes Hinterholzer appeared soloist distinguished symphony chamber orchestras including Mozarteum Orchestra Salzburg, Bruckner Orchestra Linz, Augsburg Philharmonic Orchestra, Vienna Chamber Orchestra, Salzburg Chamber Philharmonic Orchestra,... performing compositions Vivaldi, Haydn, Schumann, Saint-Saëns, Strauss, Britten,...
Since followed invitations concerts principal position orchestras, Berlin Philharmonic, Mahler Chamber Orchestra, Camerata Salzburg, chamber orchestras Munich, Basel Vienna, Stuttgart,
Johannes Hinterholzer's special subjects playing ancient instruments: baroque horn.
Besides recital programs performs Concentus Musicus under Nikolaus Harnoncourt, Wiener Akademie under Martin Haselböck, Musiciens Louvre Grenoble under Minkowski other international baroque classical ensembles.
Apart orchestra work, Johannes Hinterholzer performs regularly chamber musician several international chamber festivals, Gallen Festival, Festival anima, Habuka International Music Festival Japan,
2000, became professor Anton Bruckner University (Austria), Munich Hochschule Musik darstellende Kunst holding master classes Austria, Germany, Italy, Georgia Hungary.
